label: Options Trade Panel
description: Order entry for options, spreads, and combos selected from the chain or strategy builder.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2: requiredEntitlements=["options-trading"]. 0.3: availableOn=["options"]. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file. 0.5: Widget file has no lib/mocks/ imports; TradePanel sub-component imports placeMockOrder and options-futures-mock constants internally — panel-level mock usage logged as L1 open finding. 0.6: N/A — options-data-context has no isLoading field; data is synchronous mock. 0.7: Empty state handled — TradePanel renders 'Click a row to select' when instrument===null (trade-panel.tsx line 421); all form controls are disabled when noInstrument===true; submit button disabled. Widget correctly reflects no-selection state via the TradePanel component. 0.8: N/A — context throws if Provider missing (WidgetErrorBoundary); TradePanel has no async error path. 0.9: No dead code or commented-out blocks in widget file.

l0.notes: 0.1: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2: requiredEntitlements=["options-trading"]. 0.3: availableOn=["options"]. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file. 0.5: Widget file has no lib/mocks/ imports; TradePanel sub-component imports placeMockOrder and options-futures-mock constants internally — panel-level mock usage logged as L1 open finding. 0.6: N/A — options-data-context has no isLoading field; data is synchronous mock. 0.7: Empty state handled — TradePanel renders 'Click a row to select' when instrument===null (trade-panel.tsx line 421); all form controls are disabled when noInstrument===true; submit button disabled. Widget correctly reflects no-selection state via the TradePanel component. 0.8: N/A — context throws if Provider missing (WidgetErrorBoundary); TradePanel has no async error path. 0.9: No dead code or commented-out blocks in widget file.

1.1.note: Widget reads selectedInstrument exclusively via useOptionsData() and passes it as the single prop to TradePanel. TradePanel itself manages form state locally (direction, orderType, price, amount) — appropriate for a pure UI form. However, TradePanel also calls placeMockOrder directly rather than delegating to context handleSubmitOrder. This creates a dual submit path: context has handleSubmitOrder (wired to placeMockOrder + toast + qty reset) but TradePanel bypasses it and calls placeMockOrder internally. Open finding: widget should pass handleSubmitOrder from context to TradePanel instead of letting TradePanel re-implement submission. 1.2: options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 130). 1.3: Org filter scopes watchlists; instrument selection is user-driven. 1.4: clientIds not applicable — order entry is instrument-scoped. 1.5: Strategy filter not applicable to individual instrument order entry. 1.6: Empty organizationIds returns full watchlist scope. 1.7: placeMockOrder, formatUsd from lib/mocks/ and lib/api/mock-trade-ledger used inside TradePanel — should route all order submission through context in a future refactor.

l1.notes: 1.1: Widget reads selectedInstrument exclusively via useOptionsData() and passes it as the single prop to TradePanel. TradePanel itself manages form state locally (direction, orderType, price, amount) — appropriate for a pure UI form. However, TradePanel also calls placeMockOrder directly rather than delegating to context handleSubmitOrder. This creates a dual submit path: context has handleSubmitOrder (wired to placeMockOrder + toast + qty reset) but TradePanel bypasses it and calls placeMockOrder internally. Open finding: widget should pass handleSubmitOrder from context to TradePanel instead of letting TradePanel re-implement submission. 1.2: options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 130). 1.3: Org filter scopes watchlists; instrument selection is user-driven. 1.4: clientIds not applicable — order entry is instrument-scoped. 1.5: Strategy filter not applicable to individual instrument order entry. 1.6: Empty organizationIds returns full watchlist scope. 1.7: placeMockOrder, formatUsd from lib/mocks/ and lib/api/mock-trade-ledger used inside TradePanel — should route all order submission through context in a future refactor.

knownIssues: TradePanel calls placeMockOrder directly (4 separate call sites for option/future/spread/combo modes) rather than delegating to context handleSubmitOrder — dual submit path. Widget should pass handleSubmitOrder from context as a prop to TradePanel.

TradePanel manages its own local form state (direction, orderType, price, amount) rather than using context state (tradeDirection, orderType, orderQty, orderPrice already in context). Creates state duplication.

findings.description: 1.1 — TradePanel bypasses context handleSubmitOrder and calls placeMockOrder directly with its own local form state. Context already exposes tradeDirection, orderType, orderQty, orderPrice, handleSubmitOrder. The widget file passes only selectedInstrument — all other order state is duplicated in TradePanel locally. This should be consolidated: either pass all context state as props to TradePanel, or replace TradePanel's local form with context-wired inputs.
